programs.title: Humnava
programs.desc: Humnava is more than just a drama it’s an emotional journey through love betrayal and resilience. It tells the story of a woman whose world is shaken when the one she trusted the most breaks her heart. But this is not just her story it reflects the pain of every person who’s ever been torn between loyalty and heartbreak. As relationships are tested and conspiracies unfold Humnava shows how real love doesn’t fade it fights it survives and it rises. Through shattered trust emotional trials and inner strength this drama is a reminder that in the end truth and sincerity always win.

programs.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programs.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programs.title: Maa
programs.desc: Maa is an emotional family drama about love, loss, and identity. The story follows Raaha, a lively young girl raised by her grandfather, unaware of the painful truth about her birth. Abandoned by her mother Tara to protect her, and separated from her parents due to class differences and betrayal. Will Raaha uncover the truth about her past and find the love she was denied?

programs.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programs.title: Ghulam Bashah Sundri
programs.desc: Set in a world where emotions run deep and power defines fate, Ghulam Bashah Sundri is a gripping drama of love, rivalry, and control. As relationships are tested and loyalties begin to fracture, desire turns into conflict and hearts become battlegrounds. At the center lies a compelling love triangle that draws each character into an intense emotional, social, and personal reckoning, where every choice carries consequences.
